summary: Iteration 171: CSS scroll fix and hero section removal verified. All tests PASSED. Landing page no longer has 'Social, Shop, Play & Earn Rewards' hero card. 'Everything You Need' section preserved. .bl-premium-bg has overflow-y:auto (not hidden). All pages load and scroll properly on mobile viewport (390x844).

context_for_next_testing_agent: CSS scroll fix verified: .bl-premium-bg has overflow-y:auto. Landing page hero 'Social, Shop, Play & Earn Rewards' removed. All pages load and scroll on mobile. Global touch scroll fix v4 in index.css has pan-y rules for all card types.
